headline: Shares of several companies in the broader industrials space are trading higher amid overall market strength on hopes of a debt ceiling resolution. Additionally, strength in bank stocks is also lifting overall market sentiment.
summary: Shares of several companies in the broader industrials space are trading higher amid overall market strength on hopes of a debt ceiling resolution. Additionally, strength in bank stocks is also lifting overall market sentiment.
